untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental data (market capitalization, P/E ratio, price-to-book value) and percentile ranking across securities. These are not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list, which contains only technical price/volume indicators. Market cap percentiles and P/E ratios require cross-sectional fundamental analysis incompatible with this single-security technical backtester.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: price_pos_20 (price position in 20-bar range) as weak substitute for relative valuation ranking, but this is fundamentally inadequate. The signal is inherently a cross-sectional value/quality factor signal requiring fundamental screening, not a technical entry/exit rule. Cannot be properly translated without market cap, P/E, and P/B indicator support.
